data.name: Seamlessly integrate with any OpenID Connect provider, with automatic role synchronization.
data.value: Seamlessly integrate with any OpenID Connect provider, with automatic role synchronisation.

data.name: A modern, feature-rich, and highly extensible foundation for your next web application.
data.value: A modern, feature-rich, and highly extensible foundation for your next web application.

data.name: Easily switch between providers like SQLite, MySQL, SQL Server, and an in-memory database for testing.
data.value: Easily switch between providers such as SQLite, MySQL, SQL Server, and an in-memory database for testing.

data.name: A built-in Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system for fine-grained permission management.
data.value: A built-in Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system for fine-grained permission management.

data.name: The navigation bar automatically adjusts based on user roles and permissions.
data.value: The navigation bar automatically adjusts based on user roles and permissions.

data.name: Includes extensive documentation and practical examples to get you started quickly.
data.value: Includes extensive documentation and practical examples to get you started quickly.

data.name: Automatic, AI-driven translation into 28 languages for global reach.
data.value: Automatic, AI-driven translation into 28 languages for global reach.

data.name: All dependencies are automatically registered and always available via constructor injection.
data.value: All dependencies are automatically registered and always available via constructor injection.

data.name: Features a built-in file management system with automatic avatar compression.
data.value: Features a built-in file management system with automatic profile picture compression.

data.name: A fully responsive layout that looks great on both desktop and mobile devices.
data.value: A fully responsive layout that looks great on both desktop and mobile devices.

data.name: A complete solution for user authentication and profile management right out of the box.
data.value: A complete solution for user authentication and profile management, ready to use straight out of the box.

data.name: Smart dark mode that automatically adapts to the user's system settings.
data.value: An intelligent dark mode that automatically adapts to the user's system settings.

data.name: Comes with full Docker support for simplified, consistent, and reliable deployments.
data.value: Comes with full Docker support for streamlined, consistent, and reliable deployments.

data.name: This is a template project, where we start the voyager...
data.value: This is a template project, where we begin the voyage...

data.name: Use it as a foundation for your SaaS, a backend for your mobile app, a corporate website, or a personal blog. The possibilities are endless.
data.value: Use it as a foundation for your SaaS, a backend for your mobile app, a corporate website, or a personal blog. The possibilities are endless.

data.name: Here's what developers from our community have to say.
data.value: Here's what developers from our community have to say.

data.name: Here are some of the answers you might be looking for.
data.value: Here are some of the answers you might be looking for.

data.name: Is it free to use Aiursoft Template?
data.value: Is it free to use Aiursoft Template?

data.name: Aiursoft Template is our definitive choice for enterprise projects! It's built for developers and is lightweight yet powerful. We can skip all the boilerplate for authentication and user management.
data.value: Aiursoft Template is our definitive choice for enterprise projects! It's built for developers and is lightweight yet powerful. We can skip all the boilerplate for authentication and user management.

data.name: What do I need to get started?
data.value: What do I need to get started?

data.name: Yes, Aiursoft Template is completely free and open-source under the MIT License. You can use it for personal and commercial projects without any cost.
data.value: Yes, Aiursoft Template is completely free and open-source under the MIT Licence. You can use it for personal and commercial projects without any cost.

data.name: How do I deploy my application?
data.value: How do I deploy my application?

data.name: You can get community support via GitHub Discussions. Please visit our
data.value: You can obtain community support via GitHub Discussions. Please visit our

data.name: You'll need the .NET 10 SDK, npm and your favorite IDE, like Visual Studio or JetBrains Rider. You can find the full setup guide in our documentation.
data.value: You'll need the .NET 10 SDK, npm and your favourite IDE, such as Visual Studio or JetBrains Rider. You can find the full setup guide in our documentation.

data.name: Join our community and start building today!
data.value: Join our community and start building today!

data.name: for any inquiries or to report issues.
data.value: for any enquiries or to report issues.

data.name: The template is built for easy deployment. It includes full Docker support, so you can containerize your app and run it anywhere. You can also deploy it directly to IIS, Azure App Service, or any server that supports ASP.NET Core.
data.value: The template is designed for straightforward deployment. It includes comprehensive Docker support, allowing you to containerise your app and run it anywhere. You can also deploy it directly to IIS, Azure App Service, or any server that supports ASP.NET Core.

data.name: A fast, offline-deployable enterprise office center designed to streamline your internal operations.
data.value: A fast, offline-deployable enterprise office centre designed to streamline your internal operations.

data.name: Manage employees, finances, assets, and more with a single, integrated platform.
data.value: Manage employees, finances, assets, and more with a single, integrated platform.

data.name: Everything you need to run your company
data.value: Everything you need to run your company

data.name: From HR to Finance, IT to Operations, Employee Center has you covered.
data.value: From HR to Finance, IT to Operations, Employee Center has you covered.

data.name: Flexible storage options ensuring compatibility with your existing infrastructure.
data.value: Flexible storage options ensuring compatibility with your existing infrastructure.

data.name: Granular Role-Based Access Control to ensure data security and proper authorization.
data.value: Granular Role-Based Access Control to ensure data security and proper authorisation.

data.name: Seamless integration with OpenID Connect providers for secure, single sign-on experience.
data.value: Seamless integration with OpenID Connect providers for secure, single sign-on experience.

data.name: Deploy anywhere, even in air-gapped environments, with our robust Docker support.
data.value: Deploy anywhere, even in air-gapped environments, with our robust Docker support.

data.name: Streamline financial tracking and record-keeping for better transparency.
data.value: Streamline financial tracking and record-keeping for better transparency.

data.name: Visualize organizational structure and reporting hierarchies with clarity.
data.value: Visualise organisational structure and reporting hierarchies with clarity.

data.name: Centralized system for maintaining up-to-date employee records and information.
data.value: Centralised system for maintaining up-to-date employee records and information.

data.name: Secure and efficient electronic distribution of monthly salary slips.
data.value: Secure and efficient electronic distribution of monthly payslips.

data.name: Safely share sensitive credentials and company secrets with authorized personnel.
data.value: Securely share sensitive credentials and company secrets with authorized personnel.

data.name: Track and manage expense reimbursements with an integrated calendar view.
data.value: Track and manage expense reimbursements with an integrated calendar view.

data.name: Systematize the career progression and promotion processes for your team.
data.value: Systematize the career progression and promotion processes for your team.

data.name: Keep detailed inventory records of all company hardware and software assets.
data.value: Maintain detailed inventory records of all company hardware and software assets.

data.name: Efficiently manage employee leave requests and attendance records.
data.value: Efficiently manage employee leave requests and attendance records.

data.name: Track, report, and resolve workplace incidents to ensure safety and compliance.
data.value: Track, report, and resolve workplace incidents to ensure safety and compliance.

data.name: Employee Center integrates disjointed processes into a unified workflow, eliminating manual errors and saving valuable time for your HR and Admin teams.
data.value: Employee Center integrates disjointed processes into a unified workflow, eliminating manual errors and saving valuable time for your HR and Admin teams.

data.name: Automated workflows for payroll, leave, and expenses mean less time on paperwork and more time on people.
data.value: Automated workflows for payroll, leave, and expenses mean less time on paperwork and more time on people.

data.name: Centralized data drastically reduces discrepancies in employee records and financial reporting.
data.value: Centralised data drastically reduces discrepancies in employee records and financial reporting.

data.name: Enterprise-grade security features ensure your sensitive company data remains protected.
data.value: Enterprise-grade security features ensure your sensitive company data remains protected.

data.name: Join the growing number of companies optimizing their workforce management with Employee Center.
data.value: Join the growing number of companies optimising their workforce management with Employee Center.
